rubrics: The response contains a policy_type classification of LABOR_COST
The response contains income_effect_exists set to true
The response includes current Virginia minimum wage baseline with a FRED series ID
The response identifies at least 4 transmission channels
The response includes a sector exposure matrix
The response presents confidence levels (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW) for each finding
The response includes downstream_directives for sector agents
The response presents ranges not point estimates for quantitative claims
